hooks-client.desc: Hook client untuk mendapatkan data sesi pengguna.

hooks-client.name: signIn
hooks-client.desc: Fungsi client untuk memulai proses login.
hooks-client.example:
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react"

<button onClick={() => signIn("google")}>Login with Google</button>

API Route Protection (App Router)

database-adapter.name: PrismaAdapter
database-adapter.desc: Menyimpan sesi, akun, dan user di database menggunakan Prisma.

database-adapter.name: Schema Prisma untuk Auth.js
database-adapter.example:
model Account {
  id String @id @default(cuid())
  userId String
  type String
  provider String
  providerAccountId String
  refresh_token String?
  access_token String?
  expires_at Int?
  token_type String?
  scope String?
  id_token String?
  session_state String?
  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  @@unique([provider, providerAccountId])
}

model Session {
  id String @id @default(cuid())
  sessionToken String @unique
  userId String
  expires DateTime
  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model User {
  id String @id @default(cuid())
  name String?
  email String? @unique
  emailVerified DateTime?
  image String?
  accounts Account[]
  sessions Session[]
}

model VerificationToken {
  identifier String
  token String @unique
  expires DateTime
  @@unique([identifier, token])
}

database-adapter.name: Database Migration
database-adapter.example: pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --name auth-js
